/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=13.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/main.mm.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/app_shared.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/mac_observability.mm.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_export_panels.mm.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_refresh_scheduler.mm.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_actions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_settings_sheet.mm.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_ui_format.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trace_exporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_runtime_host.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/trading_view_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/websocket_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui.dir/controller_mac.mm.o -o tws_gui.app/Contents/MacOS/tws_gui  -Wl,-rpath,@executable_path/../Frameworks ixwebsocket/libixwebsocket.a -framework AppKit -framework GameController /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
